operating_ranges.evidence: Position coder method orientation stop position - Unit of data : 1 pulse (360°/4096)
Valid data range : 0 to 32767. When this data is set to 0, 200 min⁻¹ is set.
Position gain for orientation (A parameter is selected by the CTH1A and CTH2A input signals.) Valid data range : 0 to 32767

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Position coder one-rotation signal detection error - SP0041

fault_conditions.name: one_rotation_signal_detection_error
fault_conditions.description: Position coder one-rotation signal detection error
fault_conditions.evidence: SP0041 | 9041 | SP9041 | 41 | Position coder one-rotation signal detection error

fault_conditions.name: one_rotation_signal_not_detected
fault_conditions.description: Position coder one-rotation signal not detected
fault_conditions.evidence: SP0042 | 9042 | SP9042 | 42 | Position coder one-rotation signal not detected

fault_conditions.name: position_coder_signal_error
fault_conditions.evidence: SP0047 | 9047 | SP9047 | 47 | Position coder signal error

maintenance_actions.name: check_position_detect_signal
maintenance_actions.evidence: D. Check the position detect signal (position coder signal).

maintenance_actions.name: adjust_orientation_stop_position
maintenance_actions.evidence: G. Adjust the orientation stop position. - Detection level for the orientation completion signal - Orientation stop position shift - Orientation stop position

maintenance_actions.name: check_position_coder_feedback
maintenance_actions.evidence: D. Connect position coder and check feedback signal

assumptions.statement: Position coder provides 4096 pulses per revolution for 360° rotation
assumptions.reason: Manual specifies unit of data as 1 pulse (360°/4096) for position coder method

assumptions.statement: Position coder must be connected directly or with 1:1 gear ratio to spindle
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'Connection to Spindle: Directly connected or connected with a gear or timing belt at a ratio of 1:1'

assumptions.statement: Position coder is the only supported separate detector for αCi series
assumptions.reason: Manual notes 'The spindle sensor (separate detector) usable with the αCi series spindle amplifier is a position coder only'
